observe.description: What you see: focused window, key element IDs, current state. 50+ tokens.

reason.description: Why you chose these actions. Reference the planner's instruction. 50+ tokens.

actions.description: Actions: click <ID>, double_click <ID>, type <ID> <text>, replace <ID> <text>, press <ID> <keys>, scroll_down <ID>, scroll_up <ID>, hover <ID>, done.

expect.description: What you expect to see after these actions execute. 50+ tokens.

extended_observation_needed.description: True if you need UI trees of additional windows expanded next cycle.

expand_data.description: Data to fetch for next cycle. Refs: clipboard, cycle_N_typed, run_history.

developer_feedback.description: Risks, loops detected, alternative approaches if this fails. 50+ tokens.
